mapper.select: SELECT customer_id, store_id, first_name, last_name, email, address_id, activebool, create_date, last_update, active FROM customer ORDER BY last_name, first_name
SELECT customer_id, store_id, first_name, last_name, email, address_id, activebool, create_date, last_update, active FROM customer WHERE customer_id = #{customerId}

SELECT c.customer_id, c.store_id, c.first_name, c.last_name, c.email, c.address_id, c.activebool, c.create_date, c.last_update, c.active, a.address, a.address2, a.district, a.phone, a.postal_code FROM customer c LEFT JOIN address a ON c.address_id = a.address_id WHERE c.customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customer (store_id, first_name, last_name, email, address_id, activebool, create_date, last_update, active) VALUES (#{storeId}, #{firstName}, #{lastName}, #{email}, #{addressId}, #{activebool}, #{createDate}, COALESCE(#{lastUpdate}, now()), #{active}) RETURNING customer_id
mapper.update: UPDATE customer SET store_id = #{storeId}, first_name = #{firstName}, last_name = #{lastName}, email = #{email}, address_id = #{addressId}, activebool = #{activebool}, active = #{active}, last_update = now() WHERE customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.select: SELECT c.customer_id, c.first_name || ' ' || c.last_name AS full_name, c.email, COUNT(p.payment_id) AS total_transactions, SUM(p.amount) AS total_spent, ROUND(AVG(p.amount), 2) AS avg_transaction, MAX(p.amount) AS max_transaction, MIN(p.amount) AS min_transaction, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(p.amount) DESC) AS rank FROM customer c JOIN payment p ON c.customer_id = p.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name, c.email HAVING SUM(p.amount) >= #{minAmount} ORDER BY total_spent DESC

SELECT c.customer_id, c.store_id, c.first_name, c.last_name, c.email, c.address_id, c.activebool, c.create_date, c.last_update, c.active FROM customer c WHERE c.store_id IN ( SELECT s.store_id FROM store s START WITH s.store_id = #{storeId} CONNECT BY PRIOR s.store_id = s.manager_staff_id ) ORDER BY c.last_name, c.first_name
